mapper.select:
SELECT A.seq as seq, (select rboard_type_sub_nm from mst.tb_req_board_type_sub trbts where rboard_type_sub_cd = A.rboard_division) as rboard_division, A.rboard_title as rboard_title, A.rboard_desire_date as rboard_desire_date, A.rboard_purpose_request as rboard_purpose_request, A.rboard_importance as rboard_importance, A.rboard_content as rboard_content, A.dcreate_dt as dcreate_dt, A.screate_id as screate_id, A.dmodify_dt as dmodify_dt, A.smodify_id as smodify_id, A.susernm as susernm, A.rboard_action_detail as rboard_action_detail, (select rboard_type_sub_nm from mst.tb_req_board_type_sub trbts where rboard_type_sub_cd = A.rboard_progress) as rboard_progress, A.rboard_expected_date as rboard_expected_date, A.RNUM FROM ( SELECT A.seq, A.rboard_division, A.rboard_title, A.rboard_desire_date, A.rboard_purpose_request, A.rboard_importance, A.rboard_content, A.dcreate_dt, A.screate_id, A.dmodify_dt, A.smodify_id, A.susernm, A.rboard_action_detail, A.rboard_progress, A.rboard_expected_date, ROWNUM RNUM FROM ( SELECT A.seq, A.rboard_division, A.rboard_title, A.rboard_desire_date, A.rboard_purpose_request, A.rboard_importance, A.rboard_content, A.dcreate_dt, A.screate_id, A.dmodify_dt, A.smodify_id, A.susernm, B.rboard_action_detail, B.rboard_progress, B.rboard_expected_date FROM mst.tb_req_board A LEFT JOIN mst.tb_req_board_reply B ON A.seq = B.rboard_seq
order by A.seq desc ) A WHERE ROWNUM <= #{lastIndex} ) A WHERE RNUM >= #{firstIndex}
SELECT count(1) FROM mst.tb_req_board A LEFT JOIN mst.tb_req_board_reply B ON A.seq = B.rboard_seq
select * from mst.tb_req_board_type_sub where rboard_type_cd = #{rboardTypeCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT A.seq, A.rboard_division, A.rboard_title, A.rboard_desire_date, A.rboard_purpose_request, A.rboard_importance, A.rboard_content, A.dcreate_dt, A.screate_id, A.dmodify_dt, A.smodify_id, A.susernm, B.rboard_action_detail, B.rboard_progress, B.rboard_expected_date, C.seq as rboard_file_seq, C.rboard_file_path as rboard_download_path, concat(C.rboard_file_path , '\', C.rboard_file_save_name) as rboard_file_path, C.rboard_file_origin_name FROM mst.tb_req_board A LEFT JOIN mst.tb_req_board_reply B ON A.seq = B.rboard_seq Left JOIN mst.tb_req_board_upload C ON A.seq = C.rboard_seq WHERE A.seq = #{seq, jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.insert:
select NEXTVAL('mst.tb_req_board_seq')
insert into mst.tb_req_board( seq, rboard_division, rboard_title, rboard_desire_date, rboard_purpose_request, rboard_importance, rboard_content, screate_id, smodify_id, susernm ) values( #{seq, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{rboardDivision, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rboardTitle, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rboardDesireDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{rboardPurposeRequest, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rboardImportance, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rboardContent, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rboardScreateId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rboardSModifyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sUserNm, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )

insert into mst.tb_req_board_reply( rboard_seq, rboard_progress, screate_id, smodify_id ) values( #{rboardSeq, jdbcType=BIGINT}, 'RES005', #{rboardScreateId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rboardSModifyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
)

insert into mst.tb_req_board_upload( rboard_seq, rboard_file_origin_name, rboard_file_save_name, rboard_file_path, screate_id, smodify_id ) values( #{rboardSeq, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{rboardFileOriginName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rboardFileSaveName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rboardFilePath, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rboardScreateId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rboardSModifyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.update: UPDATE mst.tb_req_board_upload SET rboard_file_origin_name = #{rboardFileOriginName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, rboard_file_save_name = #{rboardFileSaveName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, rboard_file_path = #{rboardFilePath, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, smodify_id = #{rboardSModifyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, dmodify_dt = sysdate WHERE rboard_seq = #{rboardSeq, jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: SELECT A.seq, (select rboard_type_sub_nm from mst.tb_req_board_type_sub trbts where rboard_type_sub_cd = A.rboard_division) as rboard_division, A.rboard_title, A.rboard_desire_date, A.rboard_purpose_request, A.rboard_importance, A.rboard_content, A.dcreate_dt, A.screate_id, A.dmodify_dt, A.smodify_id, B.rboard_action_detail, (select rboard_type_sub_nm from mst.tb_req_board_type_sub trbts where rboard_type_sub_cd = B.rboard_progress) as rboard_progress, B.rboard_expected_date, A.susernm FROM mst.tb_req_board A LEFT JOIN mst.tb_req_board_reply B ON A.seq = B.rboard_seq WHERE A.seq = #{seq, jdbcType=BIGINT}
SELECT suser_id, suser_nm, suser_email FROM mst.tb_req_admin_email
